description: Backwoods have always been the everyman's cigar, and their Backwoods Philippines Prestige lives up to that status. Cloaked in a dense Philippine broadleaf harvested from the country's volcanic terrain, this beauty opens with a powerful earthy foundation that coats your palate. Each draw features waves of dark molasses and sweetness. The finish brings a tingling pepper that lingers long enough to make you want another one. The all-Philippine construction is what makes this sing. The Philippine binder and filler tobaccos are harvested from the same rich volcanic terrain as the wrapper. This unity creates a remarkably mellow 4.5x32 Parejo that punches well above its weight class. Burns even, doesn't flake apart mid-session, and the stem runs straight as an arrow. This budget-friendly, machine-made cigar can rival hand-rolled premiums. Try 10 packs of 3 for a total of 30 and save more compared to buying them individually. Order yours at JR Cigars.

Check out the Backwoods City Packs L.A. Aromatic 4.50 x 32. For decades, Backwoods has built its reputation city by city across the U.S. This Limited-Edition Collection is a tribute to the very streets that made the brand a household name, with a profile designed around the breezy vibe of California's famous metropolis. The rugged Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper defines the exterior, showing off its signature frayed ends and rustic veins. Beneath is a Homogenized Tobacco Leaf binder and Caribbean Basin Cuban Seed filler. Expect a creamy, honey-infused sweetness that feels as smooth as a Pacific breeze. These cigarillos have become a favorite for smokers across the country due to their delectably good flavors. This offering arrives in a carton of 8 packs of 5 (Total of 40). Enjoy a great deal and fast shipping by ordering online at JR Cigars.

Backwoods Select Honduras 1883 is a throwback you'll want to try for yourself. It marks the year Honduras officially opened its tobacco industry to local growers. With the Honduras 1883, you'll feel the raw flavor from the country's rugged terrain in this mellow-to-medium-bodied experience. The 4.50x32 Parejo uses a sun-kissed Connecticut wrapper grown in Honduras, paired with Caribbean Basin Cuban-seed fillers. This machine-made beauty has the same rustic look and feel Backwoods smokers have come to expect. It may be machine-made, but it smokes with a kind of rugged and earthy cedar depth that can stand up to plenty of hand rolled sticks. If you're looking for a wallet-friendly cigar that still delivers a solid experience, Backwoods Select Honduras 1883 is a solid choice. Enjoy quality flavors without paying premium prices when you order from JR Cigars. Available in a box of 30, have one shipped to your door today!

With their rustic look and delectably good flavors, Backwoods Cigars have become a favorite for adult consumers across the country. First introduced in 1973 and going national in 1981, Backwoods have since taken off and can be found in just about every convenience store, gas station, or tobacconist. Although they are machine-made, Backwoods' old-school look and feel could fool any aficionado.

product_name: Backwoods City Packs The Purple Pack Houston
description: Houston's iconic flavor has arrived! Get ready for a taste of the city with The Purple Pack Houston Backwoods City Packs. This latest offering, 'The Purple Pack', is an exclusive release. A fleeting opportunity to indulge in a unique flavor, it's specially crafted for the real ones who appreciate bold, smooth flavor. Mellow in strength, Caribbean Basin Cuban Seed filler tobacco is finished in a Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper and rolled into a 4.5-inch length and 32 ring gauge. The charm and delectable flavor profile you appreciate are now more accessible than ever. With our streamlined service, the essence of a classic is delivered directly to your door, ensuring a seamless and satisfying experience. Available in 8 packs of 5 cigarillos, for a total of 40, grab yours while you can and shop JR Cigars online today.

product_name: Backwoods City Packs Sweet Summertime Chi
description: So, you're telling us it's not always summer in Chicago? This isn't just any flavor. This is the Sweet Summertime Chi Backwoods City Packs–here for a good time, not a long time. Crafted with some special ingredients and a whole lot of summer spirit, it's specially made for enthusiasts who prefer a sweeter, mellow-flavored smoking experience. A Caribbean Basin Cuban Seed filler tobacco is finished in a Connecticut Broadleaf wrapper and rolled into a 4.5-inch length and 32 ring gauge. Backwoods took the best of Chicago and packed it up just for you. Get a taste of the windy city with this special flavor available in 8 packs of 5 cigarillos, for a total of 40. Shop online at JR Cigars and stock up today.
